ham.name: Ham
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Place ham in a roasting pan. Rub brown sugar over ham. Attach pineapple slices to the outside of ham with toothpicks. Use additional toothpicks to secure a cherry into the middle of each pineapple slice. Pour ginger ale and reserved pineapple juice into the pan. Tent aluminum foil over ham.
Bake in the preheated oven for 4 hours. Remove aluminum foil and continue baking for 30 minutes more.

ham-bone-and-bean-soup.name: Ham Bone And Bean Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place bean mix into a large bowl and cover with several inches of water; soak for at least 24 hours. Drain completely.
Bring chicken stock to a boil in a pot large enough to hold the beans and, eventually, the ham bone. When boiling, add soaked beans. Reduce the heat and simmer until tender, about 1 hour.

Return stock and beans to a boil. Add ham bone, onion, carrots, celery, garlic, and bay leaves. Reduce the heat to low and simmer until vegetables are soft, about 1 hour. Add chopped ham, liquid smoke, and mustard powder. Stir and let simmer until flavors blend, about 30 more minutes.
Remove ham bone from the soup. Season with salt and pepper before serving.

ham-cheese-pie-four-cheeses-argiro.name: Ham Cheese Pie Four Cheeses
instructions: We make the cream with the four cheeses first.
Melt the butter in a pot.
Add the semolina and mix to butter well.
Add the milk and mix until the cream dickens for a few minutes.
After she's tied up, we pull her out of the fire.
Add the eggs and yolks one by one, stringing with wire to homogenize the cream.
Let the cream cool.
When the cream cools, add the crushed feta cheese, grated cheeses, ham and grilled tomatoes.
Mix to unite the materials.
Rub pepper at will and mix.
We will use shelling pan for pie, 38 or 40 cm, which we oil lightly.
Set three radial leads, sprinkle themm in between with some olive oil.
Make sure the edges of the leaves are out of the baking pan.
Spread the filling, i.e. the cream four cheeses, on the sheets in thin layer.
Turn forwards (on the filling) the outgoing leads.
On top, oiling them one by one, the remaining 3 leads, pouring their Edges under the pie (as we do in the milk burke).
Bake the ham pie at 180oC in the lower grill or 160 degrees C in the air in the middle grill for about 40 minutes, until the surface is well browned.
Turn it over to a biger baking pan and continue baking for about 20 minutes, for a crisper result.
Alternatively, if you don't want to turn it over, turn the evening only to the lower residence, the last twenty minutes, to make the ham turn well below.
We take it all to a large surface and cut it into pieces.
Serve while warm and the Leaf is delicious and crispy.

hazelnut-praline-argiro.name: Hazelnut Praline
instructions: Melt the couverture and butter into a ben marie first.
Add the cocoa and sugary milk.
Finally, add the ground hazelnuts.
Mix very well with spatula and let the homemade portion cool.
Keep the Hazelnut praline in jars in the refrigerator for 2-3 weeks.

healthier-fresh-strawberry-muffins.name: Healthier Fresh Strawberry Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease 24 muffin cups or line with paper liners.
Mix all-purpose flour, oats, whole wheat flour, sugar, flax seed meal, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl. Stir in milk, coconut oil, applesauce, and eggs. Fold in strawberries.
Fill the prepared muffin tins evenly with batter, about 3/4 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean, about 20 minutes.

healthier-white-chocolate-raspberry-chee.name: Healthier White Chocolate Raspberry Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Cover the outside of a 9-inch springform pan with double layers of aluminum foil.
Mix together cookie crumbs, 1 tablespoon sugar, and melted butter in a bowl. Press mixture into bottom of pan.

Combine raspberries, 2 tablespoons sugar, cornstarch, and water in a saucepan. Bring to boil and continue boiling until sauce is thick, about 5 minutes. Strain sauce through a mesh strainer to remove seeds.
Melt white chocolate chips with milk in a metal bowl over a pan of simmering water, stirring occasionally until smooth.

Mix together Neufchatel cheese and 1/2 cup sugar in a large bowl until smooth. Beat in eggs, one at a time. Blend in vanilla extract and melted white chocolate. Pour half the batter over crust. Spoon 3 tablespoons raspberry sauce over batter. Pour remaining cheesecake batter into pan and spoon 3 more tablespoons of raspberry sauce over batter. Swirl batter with tip of knife to create marbled effect. Place pan in a roasting pan and fill roasting pan with hot water to reach halfway up outside of pan.
Bake in preheated until filling is set, 55 to 60 minutes. Cool completely. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 8 hours before removing from pan. Serve with remaining raspberry sauce.

heirloom-tomato-salad.name: Heirloom Tomato Salad
instructions: Whisk olive oil, vinegar, rosemary, and oregano together in a large bowl. Add tomatoes and toss until evenly coated. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, 10 to 15 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper. Toss again before serving.

heraklion-style-kallistsounia-lezzet.name: Heraklion Style Kallistsounia
instructions: 1. Mix and knead the raw material in a deep container and listen to a watch.
2.   Mix internal mortar materials by taking a rough.
3. Finely open with dough lava, after cut round pieces with a plate of 10-12 cm, thicken the inner tribute to one side of the dough and close half a month.
4. After all the dough is prepared, fry the bottom in the angry oil.

herb-stuffed-flatbreads-with-yogurt-sauc.name: Herb-stuffed Flatbreads With Yogurt Sauce

ingredients.item: Whole wheat flour or spelt flour
Diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Finely chopped mixed tender herbs (such as parsley
ingredients.prep: cilantro, dill, mint, basil, and/or chives)

instructions: Mix ½ cup (60 g) whole wheat flour or spelt flour, 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¾ cup water in a large bowl with a wooden spoon until a shaggy dough forms. Knead in bowl until dough is mostly smooth and releases easily from sides, about 4 minutes. Drizzle 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil over and turn dough to coat. Cover bowl with a damp kitchen towel and let dough rest at room temperature 30 minutes.

Meanwhile stir together ½ cup plain whole-milk yogurt, 2 Tbsp. mayonnaise, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl. Squeeze in juice from 1 lemon half; stir to combine. Chill yogurt sauce until ready to serve.

Toss together 3 scallions, finely chopped, 3 cups finely chopped mixed tender herbs (such as parsley, cilantro, dill, mint, basil, and/or chives), ½ tsp. paprika, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and remaining 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium bowl. Squeeze in juice from remaining 1 lemon half; toss again.

Divide dough into 8 equal pieces (about 50 g each) and form
into balls. Working one at a time and keeping the rest covered, roll out each ball on a
lightly floured surface to a thin oval about 6x4". Rotate dough so a short side is
closest to you and place ¼ cup herb filling on top half of oval; spread with your
fingers to cover upper half, leaving a ¼" border. Fold empty half of oval up and
over filling to bring edges together; pinch firmly to seal. (If you don’t seal the dough
well, it will burst open and leak filling while frying.) Transfer to a parchment-lined
baking sheet and cover with another damp kitchen towel.

Fit a large cast-iron skillet with thermometer and pour in vegetable oil to come ¾" up sides. Heat over medium until thermometer registers 325°. Working in batches and returning oil to 325° between batches, carefully lower flatbreads into oil and fry until golden brown and slightly puffed, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to paper towels to drain; season with salt.
Cut flatbreads into halves or thirds and arrange on a platter. Sprinkle yogurt sauce with paprika and serve alongside.

herby-avocado-hummus.name: Herby Avocado Hummus

ingredients.prep: finely grated or smashed to a paste with flat side of knife on cutting board

instructions: Process avocado, chickpeas, tahini, lime juice, garlic, salt, pepper, cumin, and 1 cup cilantro in a food processor until smooth, about 1 minute. With the motor running, stream in 2 Tbsp. oil, then continue to process until hummus is very light and creamy, about 1 minute longer. Taste and season with salt, if needed.
Transfer hummus to a shallow bowl. Top with pepitas and cilantro and drizzle with more oil.
Do Ahead: Hummus can be made 4 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container, cover surface with plastic, and chill.

honey-and-sesame-chicken-recipe-comedera.name: Honey And Sesame Chicken Recipe
honey-and-sesame-chicken-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de pollo con miel y ajonjolí
instructions: Pica la pechuga de pollo en cubos
Bate los ingredientes para el capeado, la clara, harina, maicena, levadura, aceite, sal y agua
Summer the chicken cubes into the mixture and stir them well
In a saucer adds oil up to cover about 5 cm
When the oil's hot, empty the chicken cubes bounced one by one so that they don't stick
When they have taken a golden tone get them out of oil and put them onto a plate with paper towels to absorb excess oil and reserve
In a separate bowl mix all ingredients for salsa, honey, vinegar, oil, maicena, ketchup, maicena, salt, ginger and water
Bate bien tu salsa hasta que se integren todos los ingredientes
In an oil saucer adds well minced garlic teeth and pits
Agrega la salsa y revuelve a fuego bajo hasta que espese
Add some fried chicken and stir to get them well impregnated in the salsa
Add the seedlings to your taste
Disfruta

honey-mustard-chicken-salad.name: Honey Mustard Chicken Salad
instructions: In a small bowl or liquid measuring cup, mix the honey, mustard, oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Place the chicken thighs in a dish and pour the marinade over the chicken, reserving half for later.
Flip the chicken thighs over, fully covering them in the marinade.
Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes to an hour.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat, and place the chicken thighs in the pan.
Cook for five minutes on each side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the chicken and set aside.
Wipe the pan clean and place back on the heat.
Add the chopped bacon to the pan and cook until crispy, about ten minutes.
Transfer the bacon to a paper towel-lined plate to drain.
Add three tablespoons of water to the reserved marinade and stir to combine.
Slice the chicken into strips.
Add the romaine, cherry tomatoes, red onion, avocado, cooked bacon, and chicken to a bowl and drizzle with the remaining honey mustard dressing.
Enjoy!

honey-mustard-chicken-meal-prep.name: Honey-mustard Chicken Meal Prep
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the sweet potato, red potato, red onion, Brussels sprouts, green beans, and carrots on the baking sheet in separate piles.

Drizzle everything with olive oil, then sprinkle with salt, pepper, thyme, and rosemary. Rub the seasoning into the vegetables until evenly coated and spread flat on the baking sheet, keeping the vegetables separate. Set aside.
In a small bowl, combine the mustard, honey, garlic, salt, and pepper, and whisk until smooth. Set aside.

Place the chicken thighs skin-side down in a greased cast-iron skillet. Season with salt and pepper, then brush generously with the honey-mustard sauce. Flip the chicken thighs over and repeat, seasoning with salt and pepper, then brushing with the rest of the honey-mustard sauce.

Place the vegetables and the chicken in the oven on separate racks. Bake for 30 minutes or until chicken reaches an internal temperature of 74°C (75°C) . (Optional: Remove the vegetables once cooked and broil the chicken for 1-2 minutes, or until the skin crisps up.)
Let everything cool, then distribute into resealable containers, mixing up the combination of vegetables so that you get something a little different each day.
Cover and refrigerate for up to 4 days.
Enjoy!

how-to-cook-bacon-in-the-oven.name: How To Cook Bacon In The Oven
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place bacon slices, one next to the other, on the prepared baking sheet. Bake in the preheated oven for 15 to 20 minutes.
Remove from the oven to flip bacon slices with kitchen tongs and then return to the oven.
Bake until crispy, 15 to 20 minutes more. Thinner slices will need less time, about 20 minutes total. Drain on a plate lined with paper towels.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-artichoke-pizza-comedera.name: How To Make Artichoke Pizza

ingredients.item: 100 g of pasta or tomato sauce

instructions: Begins the recipe, preparing the dough. In a bowl, add flour, salt and yeast, stir up into the dry ingredients.
Open up a space in the middle, Volcano type. Add oil and water. Fold with your hands up to a smooth and smooth mass.
Pass the mass to the previously grown kitchen top to stretch well and achieve a very manageable texture.
Make your double a ball and put it in a bowl to leave up for 1 hour.

how-to-make-baked-halibut-with-herbs-com.name: How To Make Baked Halibut with Herbs
how-to-make-baked-halibut-with-herbs-com.original_name: Cómo hacer halibut al horno con hierbas
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Swallow the halibut steaks with salt and pepper from both sides.

Filling steaks from both sides with this mixture and let rest for 5 minutes.
After that time, place the halibut steaks on a plate with grease or baking paper.
Hornea for 15 to 20 minutes or until they are soft and golden.
Once ready, turn off and remove from the oven. They'll be ready to enjoy.

how-to-make-caramel-sauce-comedera.original_name: Cómo hacer salsa de caramelo casera
instructions: In a pot with a thick background, add sugar. Mist the pot to have a flat and uniform cape.

how-to-make-carrot-tinga-comedera.name: How To Make Carrot Tinga

After that time, pour out the liquefied salsa, the bay leaf, oregano, salt and pepper to taste.

Rectifica de sal y pimienta, retira la hoja de laurel y apaga.

Cocina por 10 minutos, volteando el pollo hasta que se cocine por completo. Retira el pollo y reserva.
In the same frying pan, add butter and let it melt. Add the mushrooms. Cooking till they get golden and start releasing fluids, for 5-6 minutes.

Hail to taste and prove. Add more condiment if necessary.
Agrega el pollo y cocina a fuego lento. Espera que la salsa espese un poco, cerca de 5 minutos.

how-to-make-kiwi-jam-comedera.name: How To Make Kiwi Jam

Mezcla y lleva al fuego.
Cocina a fuego medio - bajo por unos 15 minutos hasta que la fruta se empiece a ablandar.

Cooking the Linguines with salt water till they are at dente. Reserve ½ cup of cooking and draining water.
In a large frying pan, heat up olive oil and spray garlic till soon as it dors.

Uncover those that don't open. Add the baked dough to the frying pan with some water reserved if the salsa is very dry. It's a good mix.
Add fresh chopped parsley, pepper to taste and serve hot with a slice of lemon if you want an acid touch.

In a blender or shredder, add a cup of milk and yogurt. Then add the mango and mix until you have a homogenous consistency.
Once ready, add to a glass and decorate with a mint leaf.
Enjoy!

It gradually incorporates olive oil while you continue to shredded up and get a creamy emulsion.

how-to-make-peruvian-matasquita-comedera.name: How To Make Peruvian Matasquita
instructions: En una olla calienta un chorro de aceite a fuego medio alto.
Add the meat and let it sleep for about 2 or 3 minutes.
Put the fire down and add onion and garlic and panca.
Add the meat, salt and pepper stock to your taste.
When his flesh with his broth is already boiling, add his pate and his peas and his elk.
Cooking till the vegetables are well cooked.
It serves hot with white rice and sprinkle peppermint.

how-to-make-pork-ribs-noodle-soup-comede.name: How To Make Pork Ribes Noodle Soup
how-to-make-pork-ribs-noodle-soup-comede.original_name: Cómo hacer sopa de fideos con costillas de puerco
instructions: A medium high heat pot heats up 4 tablespoons of oil and cooks the crisped pork ribs till golden.
Put the fire down half low and add the chopped onion and green pepper with the ribs and stir.
Cooking for 2 minutes or until onion becomes clear.
It incorporates garlic and minced tomatoes. Remix and let cook for 5 minutes sometimes moving.
Pour tomato sauce, mix well so that all ingredients impregnate
Add noodles to snir slightly.
Add the 4 cups of re stock, also incorporates the two bay leave and remove again.
Cover the pot and cook for 10 minutes with soft fire.
After time, put out the fire and leave to stand for 5 minutes, here you can rectilate salt if necessary.
Serves and enjoys with cilantro and lemon.
